message.thinking:
We need to produce JSON array with three objects, one per question. For each we set "question" to either "Chapters", "Description", "Structure". Provide feedback on compliance. Let's evaluate.

Text: "Darbs sastāv no ievada, trim nodaļām un secinājumiem. Pirmajā nodaļā tiek apskatīti noskaņojuma analīzes un aspektā sakņotas noskaņojuma analīzes pamatprincipi un pielietojumi. Otrā nodaļa satur atlasīto mašīnmācīšanās un citu algoritmu, lielo valodas modeļu aprakstus un to salīdzinājumus. Trešajā nodaļā tiek realizēti atlasītie algoritmi. Beigās ir apkopoti secinājumi par darbu."

Question 1: Chapters. Does the text list the main sections? It says "trim nodaļām" and gives 3 names: first, second, third. So yes lists. Complies true. Feedback: mentions listing, but could include titles. But question just asks does it list main sections. It does. So comply.

Question 2: Description. Does text briefly describe contents of each section? Yes: describes content of each. So compliance true.

Question 3: Structure. Can it be easily understood what is general structure just from text? It says introduction, 3 chapters, conclusion. So yes. Complies true.

So all true. Provide feedback accordingly. Ensure JSON array of 3 objects.
